description: User examines the traveller details form on the Flight Centre booking page.

description: User hovers over the flight itinerary details in the sidebar.

description: User switches browser tabs from Flight Centre to the Askable session page.

description: User reads the prompt on the Askable page: 'What's making you hesitate there'.
